query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, COUNT(l.id) as total_lancamentos FROM users u LEFT JOIN lancamentos l ON u.id = l.usuarioId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Carol%' OR u.email LIKE '%carol%' GROUP BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 6G4J6icMmx5rEXy.0667aace6315 --database dyVJYfPkMaKo6dqqnRNgqj --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, COUNT(l.id) as total_lancamentos FROM users u LEFT JOIN lancamentos l ON u.id = l.usuarioId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Carol%' OR u.email LIKE '%carol%' GROUP BY u.id;
